note: Phase 5 (restyle/ship). LIVE contracts the app + scripts point at (config.ts). Fresh small-tree pool+asp redeployed for a clean post-restyle e2e; verifier reused. Prior deployments remain valid historical records (phase2/3/4.json).
restyle: iPhone frame removed; responsive shell (desktop left-sidebar nav, mobile bottom tabs); viewport-filling drifting glow; centered contained column. No change to any contract call, witness builder, snarkjs proving path, proving screen, or event listener.

post_restyle_regression_check.non_allowlisted: witness fails at the clean-funds assert (graceful)
post_restyle_regression_check.merchant_loop: register detected the real SpendEvent; negative test (different merchant/amount) did NOT flip
